nasb.text: People will stagger from sea to sea And from the north even to the east; They will go to and fro to seek the word of the Lord, But they will not find it.

esv.text: They shall wander from sea to sea, and from north to east; they shall run to and fro, to seek the word of the Lord, but they shall not find it.

cnv.text: 他們從這海飄流到那海， 從北到東， 到處奔走，要尋求耶和華的話， 卻尋不見。

ccb.text: 人们从南到北，从东到西， 在境内四处流荡， 要寻找耶和华的话却找不到。
